input.name: Acme $1.2M expansion workflow

artifacts.label: Governance case: dropped EU data residency requirement
Security assessment (pass 2, with EU residency owner assigned)
Technical feasibility (pass 2, EU data residency plan)
Eval case: second pass passes all governance checks

input.notes: Two-pass workflow: first pass produced a false green (EU residency missed); governance correction enforced a second pass with the requirement honored. Agents: Product (commercial), Security (data/compliance), Engineering (infrastructure). This stream captures the complete artifact lineage and inter-run dependencies.
